arts.ttl: PLAY TEAMSHEET: Can YOU name the Wolves team that beat Man City 1-0 in 2003? Or pick YOUR team and guess their starting XI
arts.sum: Every day we'll challenge you to name a different starting XI from the Premier League era. We'll give you a team's rough formation, and the number of letters in each player's name. Then it's up to you!

arts.ttl: Wolves XI vs Manchester City – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Wolves travel to Manchester City in the Premier League this evening as Europe’s in-form team. Vitor Pereira’s team are the only side in Europe’s top five leagues to have won six consecutive league fixtures, following a fine period. arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Wolves – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City host in-form Wolves in the Premier League tonight as the Blues look to take a step closer to Champions League qualification. Pep Guardiola’s side booked their place in the FA Cup final at the weekend, securing a sixth win in seven games against Nottingham Forest at Wembley.
